steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that specifies when Ur formed. This requires precise timing information — a numeric age or date — not a general description of what Ur is or what happened to it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'describes what Ur is': Defines the supercontinent but gives no timing. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago': Directly states when Ur formed with a precise figure. ✓
  • Choice C — 'uses vague language about Ur's age': Lacks a specific timeframe; "ancient" or similar phrasing doesn't satisfy "specify when." ✗
  • Choice D — 'describes what happened after Ur formed': Focuses on subsequent events, not on when formation occurred. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
